name: Twitter / X login
description:
Logs into x.com (Twitter) with <- click 🔑 to pick username from Vault -> + <- click 🔑 to pick password from Vault ->. X has a multi-step form: username, then password (with possible challenge). Template handles the common path; if X asks for a phone confirmation or challenge, the run will fail at wait_for -- check the screenshot.

HOW TO BIND CREDENTIALS: open a 'type' step, click the 🔑 button next to the parameter label, pick your account from the Vault, then choose 'username' or 'password' (or '2FA code' for TOTP). The placeholder becomes {vault.<id>.<field>} and gets resolved to cleartext at run-launch time. Vault must be unlocked.

flow.comment: TPL-03: dismiss GDPR/consent banner if present (EU exits). Non-EU runs fall through silently — _act_click_selector logs 'not found' and the script continues.
flow.selector: #onetrust-accept-btn-handler, .qc-cmp2-summary-buttons button[mode='primary'], #CybotCookiebotDialogBodyButtonAccept, #CybotCookiebotDialogBodyLevelButtonLevelOptinAllowAll, button[aria-label*='Accept all' i], button[aria-label*='Allow all' i], [data-cookiebanner='accept_button'], [data-testid='cookie-policy-manage-dialog-accept-button'], button[aria-label='Accept all'], button[aria-label='Принять все'], button[action-type='ACCEPT'], [data-testid='accept_cookies_button']

flow.text: <- click 🔑 to pick username from Vault ->
<- click 🔑 to pick password from Vault ->
